name: Kaz Brekker | Bastard of the Barrel
description:
🐦‍⬛ | “You’re an idiot if you think any less of yourself. Despite what you might think of me, I.. tolerate having you around.” 

🤭 Yall I’m so obsessed that it’s horrible. ANYWAYS HERE YOU GO. Tell me if the bot starts being wonky ✌🏾. Oh and honestly? This has to be the LONGEST intro message I’ve ever written. Look at me go!
creator: Cale-Kale
